behavior: Interrupted text-only pipeline replies do not commit generated text that was never forwarded to output.
notes: Go-test case encodes reference AgentActivity behavior where assistant messages are committed only from forwarded_text collected from output segments; interrupted generation with no forwarded output leaves no assistant item.

behavior: LLM inference forwards flush sentinel events alongside text events without adding sentinel markers to generated assistant text.
notes: Go-test case encodes reference generation.py behavior where FlushSentinel is forwarded on the LLM text channel while generated_text only accumulates text content.

contract: LLM flush sentinel splits TTS segments
behavior: Pipeline replies split LLM text on flush sentinel boundaries so each segment is sent to an independent TTS stream while the final assistant message keeps the full generated text.
notes: Go-test case encodes reference AgentActivity pipeline behavior where FlushSentinel ends the current speech segment and starts a new TTS inference for following text.

behavior: Canceled segmented pipeline replies close the active segment input and finalize the transcript stream so partial assistant text is flushed like reference _produce_segments finally _end_segment.
notes: Go-test case encodes reference AgentActivity behavior where _produce_segments always runs _end_segment in finally, closing current text and tts_text channels during cancellation.

behavior: Final assistant transcription events preserve the exact forwarded text, including leading and trailing whitespace, instead of trimming before RoomIO flushes the segment.
notes: Go-test case encodes reference generation text forwarding and RoomIO transcription output behavior where flush publishes the accumulated text verbatim.

contract: aligned assistant final transcription text contract

notes: Go-test case encodes reference generation text forwarding and RoomIO transcription output behavior where flush publishes the accumulated text verbatim.

contract: preemptive LLM flush sentinel splits TTS segments

notes: Go-test case encodes reference AgentActivity behavior where preemptive generation starts the same segment producer used after scheduling, so FlushSentinel still closes the current TTS segment.

contract: new speech resets agent transcription segment ID and accumulated text
